product.one_line_description: Apify is a cloud-based web scraping and data extraction platform that lets users run and build web crawlers called Actors, accessible via REST APIs or MCP.

authentication.auth_summary: Apify requests are authenticated using a personal API token, which can be passed as a Bearer token in the 'Authorization' header (recommended) or as a 'token' query parameter. In addition, AI agents can authenticate and pay for Actor runs without an account using agentic payment protocols like x402 (PAYMENT-SIGNATURE header) and Skyfire (skyfire-pay-id header).

developer_access.access_notes: Anyone can sign up for Apify's Free tier ($0/month, no credit card required) and immediately obtain their secret API token from the Integrations page in the Apify Console.

api_surface.api_summary: Apify provides a RESTful HTTP API (v2) with complete OpenAPI specifications in YAML/JSON. It offers official JavaScript and Python clients, an SDK, a CLI, and comprehensive endpoints for managing, running, and getting results from Actors, datasets, key-value stores, and request queues.

mcp.mcp_summary: Apify officially hosts and maintains an open-source Model Context Protocol (MCP) server (mcp.apify.com) that enables AI agents to dynamically discover and run thousands of ready-made web scrapers (Actors) from the Apify Store, using stdio or streamable HTTP.

buildability.verdict_reasoning: Self-serve developer access is verified with a broad/moderate documented public API.

evidence_pool.evidence_snippet:
To use your token in a request, either:

*   Add the token to your request's `Authorization` header as `Bearer <token>`.
*   Add it as the `token` parameter to your request URL.

...Apify supports the x402 protocol (PAYMENT-SIGNATURE header) and Skyfire (skyfire-pay-id header).

evidence_pool.source_title: Apify pricing - plans for data collection at any scale · Apify
evidence_pool.evidence_snippet:
Free
$0
$5 to spend in Apify Store or on your own Actors

Start for free
No credit card required.
You can find your API token on the Integrations page in the Apify Console.
The Apify API (version 2) provides programmatic access to the Apify platform. The API is organized around RESTful HTTP endpoints.

evidence_pool.source_title: GitHub - apify/apify-mcp-server: The Apify MCP server enables your AI agents to extract data from social media, search engines, maps, e-commerce sites, or any other website using thousands of ready-made scrapers, crawlers, and automation tools available on the Apify Store. · GitHub
evidence_pool.evidence_snippet: The Apify Model Context Protocol (MCP) server at mcp.apify.com enables your AI agents to extract data from social media, search engines, maps, e-commerce sites, and any other website using thousands of ready-made scrapers, crawlers, and automation tools from Apify Store.
